opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-triggered scheduling often hinges on handling rate limits and ephemeral selectors. Consider building a resilient retry mechanism with exponential backoff and a robust selector strategy that anticipates changes to the target site’s structure; otherwise, you'll be chasing a moving target. It’s a constant battle between persistence and agility.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agentic systems that schedule and execute tasks based on web interactions, so I have direct experience with the challenges described in the post.
